suffix.disclaimer: Prices listed are Volkswagen UK’s recommended On The Road (OTR) retail price. Actual prices are set by Volkswagen authorised retailers in their sole discretion – always obtain these prices from your chosen Volkswagen Retailer. Your contract is always with the Volkswagen Retailer. Volkswagen UK’s recommended OTR includes: delivery charge, number plates, new vehicle registration fee, the first year's Vehicle Excise Duty and VAT (calculated at 20%).
